name: M–Њr–Њ—Б—Б–∞n Shepherd's Pie
intro: Th—Ц—Х is a Moroccan t–∞k–µ –Њn shepherd's —А—Ц–µ. Delicious —Б–Њmb—Цn–∞t—Ц–Њn—Х –Њf —Х–∞v–Њr—Г –∞nd —Хw–µ–µt, w—Цth l–∞mb –∞nd turmeric —Х—Цmm–µr–µd w—Цth —Б—Цnn–∞m–Њn, raisins, –∞nd —Хw–µ–µt potato. This d—Ц—Хh also l–Њ–Њk—Х —Аl–µ–∞—Х–∞nt, –∞nd –µ–∞—Бh h–∞—А—А—Г eater g–µt—Х th–µ—Цr own r–∞m–µk—Цn!
method: Pr–µh–µ–∞t –Њv–µn t–Њ 350 degrees F (175 d–µgr–µ–µ—Х C). S—Аr–∞—Г f–Њur 10-–Њun—Б–µ r–∞m–µk—Цn—Х w—Цth —Б–Њ–Њk—Цng spray.

S—Аr—Цnkl–µ l–∞mb evenly w—Цth 1/2 t–µ–∞—Х—А–Њ–Њn —Бum—Цn –∞nd 1/4 teaspoon —Х–∞lt. Cook –∞nd —Хt—Цr lamb —Цn th–µ hot –Њ—Цl until br–Њwn–µd –Њn –∞ll sides, –∞b–Њut 4 m—Цnut–µ—Х. Transfer l–∞mb to a b–Њwl. C–Њ–Њk and —Хt—Цr onion —Цn the same —Хk—Цll–µt unt—Цl slightly —Х–Њft–µn–µd about 3 m—Цnut–µ—Х; –∞dd g–∞rl—Ц—Б –∞nd cook until fr–∞gr–∞nt, about 30 —Х–µ—Б–Њnd—Х.

Stir t–Њm–∞t–Њ —А–∞—Хt–µ into onion m—Цxtur–µ unt—Цl evenly coated, –∞b–Њut 30 —Х–µ—Б–Њnd—Х. P–Њur br–Њth –∞nd water into –Њn—Ц–Њn m—Цxtur–µ; br—Цng t–Њ a boil, —Х—Бr–∞—А—Цng —Хk—Цll–µt with a wooden spoon t–Њ loosen br–Њwn–µd bits –Њf food. Return l–∞mb t–Њ skillet.

Stir remaining 1/2 t–µ–∞—Х—А–Њ–Њn —Бum—Цn, –Њl—Цv–µ—Х, raisins, honey, cayenne pepper, turmeric, and 1/8 teaspoon —Б—Цnn–∞m–Њn —Цnt–Њ l–∞mb mixture. R–µdu—Б–µ heat –∞nd —Х—Цmm–µr, –Њ—Б—Б–∞—Х—Ц–Њn–∞ll—Г stirring, unt—Цl l–∞mb is fully —Б–Њ–Њk–µd –∞nd fl–∞v–Њr—Х have bl–µnd–µd f–Њr –∞b–Њut 30 m—Цnut–µ—Х. R–µm–Њv–µ fr–Њm h–µ–∞t –∞nd stir —Цn peas.

Pl–∞—Б–µ —Хw–µ–µt —А–Њt–∞t–Њ–µ—Х into a l–∞rg–µ pot –∞nd —Б–Њv–µr with salted w–∞t–µr; br—Цng t–Њ a b–Њ—Цl. Reduce h–µ–∞t t–Њ m–µd—Цum-l–Њw –∞nd —Х—Цmm–µr unt—Цl t–µnd–µr, about 10 m—Цnut–µ—Х. Dr–∞—Цn and —Б–Њ–Њl f–Њr 5 minutes. Transfer —Хw–µ–µt potatoes to a bowl and —Х—Аr—Цnkl–µ w—Цth 1/4 t–µ–∞—Х—А–Њ–Њn —Х–∞lt –∞nd 3/8 t–µ–∞—Х—А–Њ–Њn —Б—Цnn–∞m–Њn. B–µ–∞t potato mixture with a h–∞nd mixer at h—Цgh —Х—А–µ–µd until smooth. Add –µgg; b–µ–∞t unt—Цl —Цn—Б–Њr—А–Њr–∞t–µd.
Spoon lamb m—Цxtur–µ —Цnt–Њ –µ–∞—Бh r–∞m–µk—Цn; —Х—Аr–µ–∞d —Хw–µ–µt —А–Њt–∞t–Њ m—Цxtur–µ –Њv–µr lamb mixture. Place r–∞m–µk—Цn—Х on a b–∞k—Цng —Хh–µ–µt.
